# GKSphereObstacle

**Class**

A spherical impassable volume to be avoided by agents.

## Declaration

```swift
class GKSphereObstacle
```

## Overview

To make agents ([doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent] objects) avoid obstacles, create a goal with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGoal/init(toAvoid:maxPredictionTime:)-7oslq] method. Agents affected by an avoid-obstacles goal will attempt to move such that their radius never overlaps that of a spherical obstacle.

To learn more about using goals and agents, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/Agent.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172-CH8] in [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

## Creating an Obstacle

- **init(radius:)**: Initializes a spherical obstacle with the specified radius.

## Placing an Obstacle

- **position**: The position of the obstacle.
- **radius**: The radius of the obstacle.

## Obstacles

- **GKObstacle**: The abstract base class for objects representing impassable areas in a game world.
- **GKCircleObstacle**: A circular impassable area to be avoided by agents.
- **GKPolygonObstacle**: A polygon-shaped impassable area in a 2D game world.

## Inherits From

- GKObstacle

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
